name: pr_ga_downstream
drl: rule R when groupby( T($k : k, $v : v); $k; $s : sum($v) ) then insert(new Out(0, $s)); end
_finding: groupby AGGREGATE binding used downstream (round 22 Tier B): $s feeds an RHS insert - one Out per group (totals 30 and 5). THE KEY BINDING IS NOT RHS-VISIBLE in the oracle ("$k cannot be resolved to a variable", rule compilation error) - the engine currently ACCEPTS $k there (engine-accepts-more edge, banked; the authoring layer walls it). Result-downstream = certified; key-downstream = out of subset.
